name: PharmaCielo Ltd.
description: PharmaCielo Ltd. is a global cannabis company headquartered in Canada, with its primary cultivation and processing operations based in Colombia. The company focuses on the ethical and sustainable production and supply of medicinal-grade cannabis oil extracts and related products. By leveraging Colombia's favorable climate and regulatory environment, PharmaCielo aims to provide high-quality, standardized cannabis products to large-scale channel distributors and pharmaceutical partners worldwide. The company is committed to rigorous quality control, scientific research, and maintaining high standards of financial accountability and regulatory oversight within the international medical cannabis industry.
